query:
UPDATE projects SET 
  videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u1ljDLF_goA',
  builderDescription = 'Kolte-Patil Developers Ltd. is a leading real estate company in Pune, established in 1991. Listed on BSE and NSE, they have delivered over 100 projects spanning 20+ million sq.ft. across residential, commercial, and IT parks. Known for their commitment to quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction, Kolte-Patil has won numerous awards including the ''Most Trusted Brand'' in real estate. Their 24K series represents ultra-luxury living with world-class amenities.',
  builderLogo = '/images/partners/kolte-patil.png',
  builderEstablished = 1991,
  builderProjects = 100
WHERE id = 2;
